end local function S(S)return p[S+(1064470-1012747)]end do local S=table.concat local d=string.char local L=type local i=p local l=table.insert local C=string.sub local e=math.floor local return(function(p,L,i,l,C,e,X,z,K,d,q,M,D,Q,F,h,x,s,P,Z,N,f,A,j,a)d,z,x,D,F,P,q,N,M,Z,s,a,h,j,Q,A,K,f=function(d,i,l,C)local Ae={}local
